channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish on street as usual, 15th April
item.description:
As usual I am raising another complain regarding the amount of rubbish on our road and payments. Having lived on Gilbert road for over 17 years this is the worst it has ever been. The lack of cleaning has progressively gotten worse to the point where children are walking on litter. I cannot recall the last time someone actually swept the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gilbert Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridges abandoned in street opposite 151a Church Walk, N16 8QQ., 15th April
item.description:
Three fridges fly tipped.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling bin collection missed for entire block of flats, 15th April
item.description:
For York court/Elizabeth Court/Palm Treet Court there has been no recycling collection in 2 weeks. The bins are completely overflowing. This is a residential block where a code is needed to access the bins.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shore Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lawn on green requires mowing, 15th April
item.description:
Lawn on green requires mowing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillcrest Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture blocking the pavement, and needs retrieving, 15th April
item.description:
Dumped furniture blocking the pavement, and needs retrieving. This is a common issue in this location, suggest signage and or cameras are installed for prevention.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillcrest Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken drain cover on cycle path, 15th April
item.description:
Drain cover has sunken in, would be trip hazard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silwood Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bicycle, 15th April
item.description:
Not locked, blocking pavement, not rideable condition

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clapham High Street, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Callcott, 15th April
item.description:
Gas bottles and rack dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Callcott Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Litter after the bins emptied. I didn’t have this cardboard outside my sitting room before the bin collection today, 15th April
item.description:
There is heaps of litter on Glenarm Rd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas Canisters, 15th April
item.description:
Gas canister and box left on street. Again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Road, Blendon, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned van, 15th April
item.description:
Transit van reg number YP60 JRU looks like it's been dumped or stolen parked in a dangerous place been there for months not moved
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickham Street, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping public footway, 15th April
item.description:
Piles of wood and windows/doors left on footway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Walk, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa still here dispite being marked as fixed several times, 15th April
item.description:
Previously reported FixMyStreet ref: 9294363 and 9284294, its being marked as fixed on this site but is still here! Remove it and stop marking this issue as fixed when it's not

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, East Surrey Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and other things dumped in banchory road, 15th April
item.description:
Mattress and other stuff dumped at end of banchory road near bridge, se3 Please dispose

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Banchory Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wall has-been damaged, 15th April
item.description:
Rubble from damaged wall has been dumped on plants

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westminster Bridge Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On side of green, 15th April
item.description:
Piece of furniture dumped out side of flat near path,been there couple of days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A shopping trolley filled with litter has accumulated next to the bus shelter, turning it into an unofficial bin and leaving the street in an unsanitary condition., 15th April
item.description:
The street is dirty. A shopping trolley that was previously blown into the middle of the road by the wind has ended up next to the bus shelter, where it has since filled with litter and is being used as an unofficial bin by passers-by. This is creating an unhygienic and unsightly environment for residents and commuters using the stop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thesiger Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: NEW 15 Apr - Graffiti On Wall in Cherry Garden Park, 15th April
item.description:
Hi guys, there is new (15 Apr) - Graffiti On Wall in Cherry Garden Park - only a few hours after Southwark Cleaning cleaned the last lot. Can you please clean it off quickly please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey Wall East, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven and I safe pavement, 15th April
item.description:
Outside 27 there is increasing damage to the pavement caused by Thames Water failing to respond to a leak reported in February (and it appears several times since). It is now a trio hazard .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ridge Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked on the footpath, 15th April
item.description:
Cannot walk this footpath

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Voce Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
